prompt: A sun-faded Provencal village wall filling the upper two-thirds — warm sand-and-ochre aged lime plaster with gentle patina and a weathered pale grey-blue wooden shutter on the right. Empty scene, absolutely NO people, no figures, no mannequins. Soft, even, diffuse open-shade daylight — no harsh sun, no hard cast shadows, gentle flat natural light. Worn stone/terracotta paving across the lower third as a clear ground plane, receding gently. Generous empty standing space in the centre for a person to be added later. Photographic, medium-format film look, fine natural grain, muted warm-neutral color, calm editorial slow-fashion mood, realistic — never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3 framing.
